thresholds.description: Your project involves working with sensitive data and complex legal frameworks. You should discuss with your legal team whether there is a safe path forward before moving forward with the technical implementation.
Your project involves some sensitive data or legal complexity. You should discuss with your legal team whether there is a safe path forward before moving forward with the technical implementation.
Your team seems to be familiar with the laws governing your data, or the project has limited involvement with sensitive data. Make sure you consult your legal team, but the path forward is promising.
